## Tracker Routes

| Public path | Runtime path | Backend |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/wr/` | `/__runtime/wr/` | `tracker-hub` |
| `/leaderboard/` | `/__runtime/leaderboard/` | `tracker-leaderboard-hub` |
| `/displayname/` | `/__runtime/displayname/` | `tracker-displayname-hub` |
| `/club/` | `/__runtime/club/` | `tracker-club-hub` |

Tracker root `/api/v1*` and `/admin*` requests belong to `tracker-hub`.
The Tools root belongs to `tools-hub`; individual tool APIs stay under their registered tool paths.

| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| aggregator-hub | `AGGREGATOR_ALLOW_INSECURE_OPEN` | `1` | forbidden |
| bannerbuilder | `BANNERBUILDER_ALLOW_EPHEMERAL_SECRET` | `1` | forbidden |
| bannerbuilder | `BANNERBUILDER_COOKIE_SECURE` | `0` | forbidden |
